title: VBGK Portable Ceramic Hob for All Cookware, Pulg in Electric Hob, Electric Cooker Hob with Black Crystal Panel Body, 240 Mins Timer, Child Safety Lock, 10 Heat Settings 176-518°F
features: Wide Range & Application:VBGK Single electric hob is suitable for 220~240v voltage, which conforms to the UK family standard voltage. It has a plug, which can be used when plugged into a family socket.The small electric cooktop is small in size, light in weight and easy to store and carry. perfect for small kitchens, dormitories, backyard cooking, RVs, boats, travel, camping, etc.

Safe & Versatile:This electric stove top can be timed independently with digital timer to adjust the temperature, power, cooking mode. Portable cooktop this way you can manage your cooking time efficiently and do other things without worry. Electric hot plates has multiple safety protection such as child safety lock, overheating protection, Double ring heating and residual heat warning.

Multi-function Ceramic Hob：VBGK Electric stove top 10 power levels to meet your different choice which is convenient for you to choose the right power to cook a variety of different foods, perfect for braise, fry, simmer, steaming, boil, stir-frying, roast. The heating effect of the Portable Electric cooktop is the same as that of the induction cooktop, and the food made is as delicious as the induction cooktop.

Better than Induction Hob:This is 220V Portable single cooktop ,not an induction cooker. Electric stove top burner do not emit high-frequency radiation. It is superior to induction cooktop. It can protect pregnant women from electromagnetic radiation and they can use it with peace of mind. When cooking with an Electric cooktop for overheat protection, residual heat indication, auto shut-off ,Safety Lock,helping you create a healthy kitchen environment.

Suitable for All Types of Cookwares：VBGK portable electric hob can be used with any type of cookware in your home, such as aluminium pans,copper pans, cast iron frying pans and non-magnetic stainless steel pans,please use flat-bottomed pots. Electric stove top Simply wipe with a clean cloth when cool. Please install according to the product manual and contact us at any time

Error Code: E1 = Voltage below 80V, E2 = Voltage above 280V, E3 = Thermocouple short circuit (reported in 2 minutes), E4 = Thermocouple open circuit (reported immediately), E5 = Thermistor short circuit, E6 = Thermistor open circuit. If you have any error codes and other problems, please contact us as soon as possible to help you solve them, thank you
description: Product Description VBGK Single Electric Hob,220V 2000W Electric Stove Top with LED Touch Control,portable ceramic hob 10 Power Levels, 4 hTimer, Safety Lock VBGK Electric Ceramic Hob,220V Electric Stove Top with Knob Control, can be used with any type of cookware in your home About VBGK Founded in 2005, VBGK is a professional induction cooker and Electric Cooktop design, production and sales company. Adhering to the rigorous manufacturing process and excellent product design. It is determined to provide every customer with the best quality products. VBGK Single Electric Hob,220V 2000W Electric Stove Top with LED Touch Control Product Size(cm) (W*D*H): 36 * 28 * 6.5cm Zone power: 2000W Child lock 1-240 min Timer ,AC 220~240V 2000W Residual heat indicator Pause function Vitro Ceramic Glass 10 Power setting Auto switch off safety Over-Temperature Protection Safe To Use VBGK portable electric hob With child control lock feature prevents unintended activation for added safety. High Quality Stove Glass Panel VBGK electric ceramic stove the high-quality glass panel surface is designed with black polished ceramic glass, durable, wear-resistant, compressive and impact-resistant, ensures excellent abrasion resistance. Timer Function VBGK electric burner sensitive digital control and up to 240-minutes timer will help you to cook perfectly and accurately. Hot Surface Indicator VBGK hot plate an "H" will appear in the surface cooking area display let you know when elements are hot to the touch with just a glance,save energy, time, and cook worry. Energy Efficient VBGK electric stove the cooktop works by far infrared heating and has no electromagnetic radiation. This makes them extremely energy efficient while providing faster heating. Easy o Clean VBGK electric stove top burner high-quality glass surface ensures excellent abrasion resistance, just wipe it with a cleaning cloth, and it looks brand new again.
